message:
📖 docs: update console to v0.3.6 and add console to version workflow (#973)

- Update console docs version from 0.1.0 to 0.3.6 (Latest)
- Demote 0.1.0 to historical version
- Add console as a project option in create-version-branch workflow
- Update shared.json with new version metadata

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ on:
   workflow_dispatch:
     inputs:
       project:
-        description: 'Project (kubestellar, a2a, kubeflex, multi-plugin, kubestellar-mcp)'
+        description: 'Project (kubestellar, a2a, kubeflex, multi-plugin, kubestellar-mcp, console)'
         required: true
         type: choice
         options:
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ on:
           - kubeflex
           - multi-plugin
           - kubestellar-mcp
+          - console
       version:
         description: 'Version number (e.g., 0.30.0)'
         required: true
@@ -73,6 +74,7 @@ jobs:
             kubeflex) BRANCH="docs/kubeflex/${VERSION}" ;;
             multi-plugin) BRANCH="docs/multi-plugin/${VERSION}" ;;
             kubestellar-mcp) BRANCH="docs/kubestellar-mcp/${VERSION}" ;;
+            console) BRANCH="docs/console/${VERSION}" ;;
             *) echo "Unknown project: $PROJECT"; exit 1 ;;
           esac
           echo "name=$BRANCH" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
